system.powerDescription:
Once per rest you force up to CAT creatures (using the people scale) to fall asleep and slip into a dream until they are moved, take damage, or the duration of this ability ends. 

If used on a supernatural creature you roll PSYCHE to determine success. In addition they wake up in CAT minutes instead of sleeping for the usual duration. By touching a creature forced to sleep with this on the back of the head you may witness whatever dream they are having from their perspective. 

Gain or grant +1D when next you or an ally take advantage of this power. This power may easily modify the difficulty of rolls whilst active.
